comment_crons: Hobby plan limit: 2 crons/project, 1x/day each. The 6 remaining cron routes (growth-discovery, health-summary, performance-recap, growth-copilot, weekly-digest, engine-watchdog) are still defined in the codebase and can be fired manually with Bearer CRON_SECRET, or via Railway scheduler / GitHub Actions / scripts/growth-autopost.mjs. Upgrade to Pro to register them with Vercel.
